data.title: Paladin EnviroTech opens first Recycle Local Satellite Facility in Laurel, MD, offering secure e-waste recycling to small and mid-sized organizations.
data.description: A company called Paladin has introduced enterprise-level electronics recycling and on-site data destruction services in Laurel, Maryland, catering to small and mid-sized businesses. This service aims to provide secure disposal of electronic devices while ensuring data security. Paladin offers these services to organizations looking for safe and efficient ways to handle e-waste.

data.title: ISS recommends Jack in the Box shareholders vote "FOR" all 10 director nominees, including Chair David Goebel.
data.description: San Diego-based Jack in the Box Inc. (NASDAQ: JACK) disclosed that Institutional Shareholder Services (ISS) has advised shareholders to vote "FOR" all 10 of the Company's director nominees, such as David Goebel, Independent Chair of the Board, using the WHITE proxy card for the upcoming 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. This recommendation pertains to the event scheduled for [date not provided].

data.title: Celsius Holdings to participate in upcoming investor conferences in Boca Raton, Florida. #CELH
data.description: Celsius Holdings, based in Boca Raton, Florida, has confirmed its presence at several upcoming investor conferences. The company shared this information through a press release via Business Wire. Celsius Holdings is known for its LiveFit brand and will be actively involved in these events to engage with investors and stakeholders. The specific number of conferences and their details were not provided in the news release.

data.title: DDC buys 80 BTC, now holds 2,068 BTC in treasury, marking 74.8% increase since start of 2026. Role of BTC strengthened.
data.description: DDC Enterprise Limited (NYSEAMERICAN: DDC) has expanded its corporate treasury by acquiring 80 Bitcoin, totaling 2,068 BTC. This marks the sixth consecutive week of Bitcoin accumulation for the company and signifies a 74.8% growth in holdings since the beginning of 2026. The purchase underscores Bitcoin's importance as a key asset in DDC's corporate strategy as a global Asian food platform and digital asset treasury firm.

data.title: Venu Holding Corporation unveils new investor Q&A video series with CEO JW Roth. Episode released today. NYSE: VENU.
data.description: Venu Holding Corporation, a reputable developer, owner, and operator of upscale live entertainment venues and premium hospitality destinations, based in Colorado Springs, Colorado, has disclosed the launch of a new video series aimed at addressing investor inquiries and providing important updates on the company's venue development and operational advancements. The initial episode was unveiled today, with subsequent episodes to be accessible on the company's official YouTube channel. Venu (NYSE American: VENU) aims to keep shareholders informed through this initiative.

data.title: Applebee’s introduces Still Together Sips drinks with Still G.I.N. By Dre and Snoop, priced at $7 and $10. Celebrating friendships with unique flavors.
data.description: In Pasadena, California, Applebee's is introducing the NEW Still Together Sips to honor lasting friendships with fabulous flavors. For a limited time, customers can savor two refreshing cocktails crafted with premium Still G.I.N. By Dre and Snoop. Exclusively at Applebee's, these star-studded drinks feature the $7 Young, Wild & Free Fruit Punch and the $10 Rollin' On The Beach. Cheers to unforgettable moments with these exclusive beverages!

data.title: Early bird savings for Kalahari Food & (Not Just) Wine Festival end Feb 28. Event on April 26 from 12-4pm. Buy GA/VIP tickets to save up to ($amount).
data.description: In the scenic Pocono Mountains region of Pennsylvania, Kalahari Resorts & Conventions is gearing up for its third annual Food & (Not Just) Wine Festival on Sunday, April 26, 2026. The event will run from 12pm to 4pm, offering a delightful experience for food and beverage enthusiasts. To secure the best value, interested individuals are encouraged to take advantage of early-bird pricing available until February 28. General Admission and VIP packages are on offer, with savings of up to [specify the savings percentage]. With tickets selling fast, this year's festival is expected to be a sell-out success.

data.title: Slate Grocery REIT declares $0.072 distribution per Class U unit for February 2026; annualized at $0.864; option to receive in Canadian dollars.
data.description: In Toronto, Slate Grocery REIT (TSX: SGR.U) (TSX: SGR.UN) disclosed that its Board of Trustees has approved a distribution for February 2026. The distribution amounts to U.S.$0.072 per Class U unit of the REIT, equivalent to U.S.$0.864 annually. Investors with Class U Units have the option to receive their payout in Canadian dollars, and they are advised to coordinate with their broker for this election.

data.title: Avetta leads in addressing global readiness gap in supply chains, focusing on evolving brand to bridge the gap.
data.description: Avetta® has unveiled a strategic brand transformation to tackle a critical issue in supply chains: the global readiness gap. This gap signifies the increasing disparity between the pace of risk escalation and the readiness of organizations to address it effectively. Emphasizing the evolving risk landscape, Avetta aims to bridge this readiness gap prevalent across teams, companies, and regions. This initiative reflects the urgency to adapt to the changing risk environment, marking a significant shift for Avetta in aligning with modern supply chain challenges.

data.title: BillionToOne to share Q4 and full year 2025 financials on March 4, 2026; earnings call at 1:30 pm Pacific / 4:30 pm Eastern.
data.description: In Menlo Park, California, on February 17, 2026, BillionToOne, Inc. (NASDAQ: BLLN), a molecular diagnostics company, will unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025. The announcement will occur post-market close on Wednesday, March 4, 2026. A conference call to review these results is scheduled for 1:30pm Pacific Time / 4:30pm Eastern Time on the same day. This event marks the company's commitment to providing inclusive and precise diagnostic tests.

data.title: Cizzle Brands expands retail presence with CWENCH Hydration in 109 Target locations in the U.S. with launch also on Target.com.
data.description: A company called Cizzle Brands Corporation (Cboe Canada: CZZL) (OTCQB: CZZLF) (Frankfurt: 8YF) has announced that their sports hydration brand, CWENCH Hydration, is now available in 109 Target stores in the United States and on Target.com. CWENCH has been on shelves since May 2025 in select U.S. retailers like Life Time Fitness and United Supermarkets. This expansion marks a significant milestone for the brand as it continues to grow its presence in the market.

data.title: Scam targets hardware wallet users with fake updates, posing as Ledger and Trezor. Stay cautious!
data.description: Fraudulent paper mailers are designed to resemble popular brands like Ledger and Trezor while promoting fake device updates. The aim is to entice users to visit malicious verification websites. Be cautious of these deceptive tactics and avoid falling victim to potential cyberattacks.

data.title: BostonGene partners with Daiichi Sankyo (TSE: 4568) to enhance drug development using AI analytics for patient selection.
data.description: In Waltham, Massachusetts, BostonGene revealed a collaboration with Daiichi Sankyo, a Tokyo Stock Exchange-listed company, integrating AI into Daiichi Sankyo's antibody drug conjugate (ADC) program. This move aims to enhance patient selection strategies by providing actionable insights beyond typical biomarker analysis. BostonGene's AI platform, known for its tumor and immune biology focus, will drive this integration for accelerated development of ADCs.

data.title: Strategist: Bitcoin bets on Trump, gold on US failure. Gold reflects doubt in economy, while Bitcoin relies on Trump's reforms.
data.description: Wellington-Altus Chief Market Strategist James Thorne suggests that investing in Bitcoin implies confidence in Trump's economic policies, while purchasing gold signifies doubt in America's success. Thorne's argument revolves around the idea that gold is no longer a simple hedge against inflation, but rather a reflection of skepticism towards Trump's ability to address the country's debt crisis. Thorne believes that investing in gold is a signal of the belief that traditional economic policies of printing money and devaluing currency are the only way out of the debt trap. On the other hand, the case for Bitcoin is rooted in the belief that Trump's economic reforms, supported by Treasury Secretary Bessent and Fed nominee Kevin Warsh, will lead to a more productive economy by redirecting capital away from Treasury holdings. Thorne's analysis contrasts these two assets as opposing views on America's future. If successful, the economic reforms proposed by Trump could potentially reduce debt and spur growth.

data.title: Toll Brothers to report Q1 earnings with expected $2.11 EPS and $1.85B revenue. Dividend yield at 0.60% ($1 share yearly).
data.description: Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE: TOL) is set to announce first-quarter earnings on Feb. 17. Analysts anticipate earnings per share of $2.11, up from $1.75 in the same period last year. The consensus forecast for quarterly revenue is $1.85 billion compared to $1.86 billion in the previous year. An Oppenheimer analyst recently upgraded the stock to Outperform and increased the price target from $155 to $177 on Feb. 10. Toll Brothers currently offers an annual dividend yield of 0.60%, translating to a quarterly dividend of 25 cents per share ($1.00 annually). Investors are eyeing potential gains from dividends. For those aiming to earn $500 monthly from Toll Brothers, the target is $6,000 annually. Additional details can be found on a financial news website.
